examples: Russia's Intourist hotels have since been sold off, including the travel company's once dowdy flagship hostelry just down the road from the Kremlin.
One time at the bar of the hotel in Odessa run by Intourist, the agency that handled foreigners' travels, a young woman jumped suddenly on my neck as flashbulbs went off.
On learning that the gallery was closed, he turned sadly to his Intourist guide.
